scripts.test:sync: cd .. && sh -c 'if [ -n "$VERCEL" ]; then echo "[sync] Skipping sync tests on Vercel"; elif command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m unittest tests.test_analysis_parity_collserola tests.test_sync_compatibility_pipeline tests.test_sync_reliability tests.test_bundle_validate tests.test_bundle_migration tests.test_bundle_checksum -q && npx --yes tsx shared/race/bundlePois.test.ts && npx --yes tsx shared/race/companionClimbs.test.ts && npx --yes tsx shared/sync/bundleValidation.test.ts && npx --yes tsx shared/sync/raceVersion.test.ts && npx --yes tsx shared/race/streetViewUrl.test.ts && npx --yes tsx shared/race/applyVerificationToBundle.test.ts; else echo "[sync] Python not available — skipping sync compatibility tests"; fi'
scripts.build: npm run test:sync && tsc -b && vite build
